pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-S-007 (DG, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4104 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.410, eu_ai_act=0.409, nist_ai_rmf=0.401) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4104 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DG-domain KSA DG-S-007 (composite 0.4104) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4104 for DG domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DG domain KSA at composite 0.4104 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4104, domain DG, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
